risk_threshold.description: Street-level drug prices are typically under $80.  A listing in this range that also matches slang is highly suspicious.

legal_reference.name: Controlled Substances Act — Prohibited Acts A
legal_reference.summary: Unlawful to manufacture, distribute, or dispense a controlled substance.

jp_legal_reference.name: Act on Securing Quality, Efficacy and Safety of Pharmaceuticals
jp_legal_reference.summary: Prohibits illicit manufacture, sale, and distribution of narcotics and stimulants in Japan.
